message:
fix: add missing test files for AI providers (#3828) (#3848)

Add test files for all AI providers that were missing them: Bob,
Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cline, Codex, Continue, Copilot CLI,
Cursor, Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot, Goose, JetBrains, Open WebUI,
Raycast, VS Code, Windsurf, and Zed.

Each test file verifies:
- Interface compliance (AIProvider)
- Correct Name(), DisplayName(), Provider() return values
- Non-empty Description()
- Capability flags
- CLI-based providers: IsAvailable()=false and Chat() error when not installed
- Version string inclusion in Description when version is set

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+package agent
+
+import "strings"
+
+// containsSubstring checks if s contains substr (test helper).
+func containsSubstring(s, substr string) bool {
+	return strings.Contains(s, substr)
+}
